home.heroTitle: Buying and selling homes in Trieste, made simple
home.heroSubtitle: TriesteImmobiliare is the smart agency for buying and selling homes in Trieste and its province. 0% commission for sellers, real guidance for buyers.

beyond.publicText: Sellers don't pay our commission. We handle pricing, the listing, photos, viewings and negotiation, from the mandate to the deed.
beyond.privateText: We help you find the right home in the right price range, with the technical and document checks done before you sign.

tour.title: Free valuation of your property
tour.text: We tell you the realistic price you can sell at and how, based on Trieste market data. No obligation, and no commission on your side.

immobili.title: Properties
immobili.intro: All currently available properties, grouped by area.

listing.empty: No properties in this area right now. Tell us what you're after and we'll let you know as soon as one comes in.

property.locationApprox: Approximate location within the area. The exact address is shared on request.

group.title: The Group
group.intro: TriesteImmobiliare is the group's brand for everyday homes in Trieste and its province.

story.eyebrow: What we were, what we are
story.title: One group, a whole market
story.intro: TriesteImmobiliare was born inside a group that knows Trieste inside out — from the premium to the everyday home.

start.title: A start in high-end hospitality
start.text: The group began by managing villas and apartments for an international, largely German-speaking clientele. That is where its reading of the city and its market was built.

pivot.title: The pivot to sales
pivot.text: Relationships and market knowledge turned into a sales practice. Rentals matured into TriesteAffitti, premium sales into TriesteVillas.

group.title: One group, clear roles
group.text: TriesteImmobiliare covers homes in every price range across Trieste and its province; TriesteVillas stays premium, TriesteAffitti handles rentals, FriuliVillas and LignanoVillas cover the wider territory. Less dispersion, more clarity.

group.groupSubtitle: A single structure covering every housing need across Trieste and the wider Friuli-Venezia Giulia region.

tsv.name: TriesteVillas
tsv.desc: Luxury property in the heart of Trieste and along the coast.

tsi.name: TriesteImmobiliare
tsi.desc: Everyday homes in every price range in Trieste and its province.

affitti.name: TriesteAffitti
affitti.desc: Considered rental management, from 1 to 18 months.

lignano.name: LignanoVillas
lignano.desc: Our local luxury vertical in Lignano.

local.title: Local and independent
local.text: We know Trieste inside out — it is home.

tailored.title: Tailored solutions
tailored.text: Every client is unique, like every home.

journey.title: From first contact to the deed
journey.text: We stay with you at every step of the way.

promo.title: Listings done right
promo.text: Careful photos, descriptions and publishing — every home deserves to be told well.

legal.rea: Registered with the Trieste Chamber of Commerce · REA no. TS 134793

sell.title: Sell your home in Trieste with 0% commission on your side.
sell.intro: Sellers don't pay our commission. We handle everything — pricing, the listing, viewings, negotiation — through to the deed. You keep the result, with no agency fees.

strategy.title: A realistic price, right away
strategy.text: We start from an honest valuation based on Trieste market data, not an inflated number to win the mandate.

channel.title: 0% commission for sellers
channel.text: Our commission is paid by the buyer's side. For you, no agency fees — a real advantage on the net price you take home.

craft.title: Listings done right
craft.text: Careful photos, a complete description, publishing on the portals and managed viewings. The home shows at its best and reaches the right people.

closing.title: Want to know what your home is worth?
closing.text: Tell us about the property and we'll come back with a free, no-obligation valuation.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Tell us what you're looking for or what you'd like to sell — we'll get back to you quickly.

footer.tagline: The smart agency for homes in Trieste.

meta.title: TriesteImmobiliare — Buying and selling homes in Trieste
meta.description: The smart agency for buying and selling homes in Trieste and its province: 0% commission for sellers, real guidance for buyers. Listings with photos, floor plans and virtual tours.
